title: f/prompts.chat
summary: prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让用户分享、发现和收集来自社区的提示词。它支持自托管，确保组织完全隐私。项目基于 Next.js 和 TypeScript 构建，涵盖了 AI、LLM、提示工程等主题，拥有超过 16 万星标，是一个高质量的提示词资源库。
summary_en: prompts.chat is an open-source project, formerly known as Awesome ChatGPT Prompts, designed for sharing, discovering, and collecting prompts from the community. It supports self-hosting for complete organizational privacy. Built with Next.js and TypeScript, it covers topics like AI, LLM, and prompt engineering, with over 166k stars, making it a high-quality prompt resource.
